privileged_info_summary: The dataset used in this task is the real IBM Telco Customer Churn dataset from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/IBM/telco-customer-churn-on-icp4d/master/data/Telco-Customer-Churn.csv. It contains 7043 customer records with 21 features including Churn (target variable with 26.54% churn rate), Contract, InternetService, tenure, and MonthlyCharges columns as specified. The data is real public data from IBM, not synthetic.
